History

Faculty of Communication

Kadir Has University Faculty of Communication was established in 2003 and upholds a strong educational philosophy aimed at nurturing innovative and creative individuals in contemporary communication fields. With a curriculum that integrates theory and practice and adopts an interdisciplinary approach, the faculty equips students with the ability to grasp various dimensions of communication sciences while providing opportunities for creative projects and industry experience. The faculty offers a broad spectrum of education, covering visual communication design, strategic communication, radio, television and cinema, advertising, and new media. With an academic staff composed of experts and industry professionals, students gain hands-on experience through real-world projects. Facilities such as RTS Studios, Podcast Workshops, Advertising Workshops, and PRLAB enable students to bring their creative ideas to life while building strong portfolios. Through national and international collaborations, exchange programs, and an industry-integrated education model, our graduates embark on careers as distinguished professionals who shape the future of the communication sector.
